text: Fine-tuning is an essential step when using large language models (LLMs) for downstream tasks. However, it often requires a large amount of work to implement the methods. In this work, we introduce a unified framework, named LLAMAFACTORY, that includes several state-of-the-art efficient fine-tuning techniques. Using our framework, one can easily fine-tune more than 100 models via a web UI (LLAMABOARD) without the need to write code. We empirically evaluate the efficiency and the performance of the proposed framework on the language modeling and text generation tasks. The proposed framework is released at https://github.com/hiyouga/LLaMA-Factory with over 25,000 stars and 3,000 forks. 1
